sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Let me try a different approach - maybe the goal is to press SPACE when the blue squares are at specific positions
# Current: left blue at 44-48, right blue at 49-53 (bottom positions)
# Let me move the blue squares to the top and then press SPACE

# First, move blue squares to top (5 UP actions)
result = action(['UP', 'UP', 'UP', 'UP', 'UP', 'SPACE'])
print(f"After 5 UP + SPACE: done={result.get('done')}, level_completed={result.get('level_completed')}")

seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] in ('S', 'W'):
        print(f"  color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']} boundary={n['boundary'][:4]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
